promptTemplate: An abstract artwork that represents the epitome of creative brilliance and never-before-seen synesthetic aesthetics, in a square {{background}} frame with {{Margin}} margins, packed with hidden details, textured canvas, vibrant {{palette}} color palette, artfully raw (((very thick impasto paint textures))), {{maxparticles}} particle density, chaos level {{chaos}}

tags.label: The Synesthetic Singularity 2.0 Glif Workflow
tags.description: Converted from Eden/Glif p52vid+txt2img+vid2vid pipeline. p5 code converted from global mode to Synthograsizer instance mode. pseudorandom()/pseudorandomSeed()/variables[] replaced with p.random()/p.getSynthVar(). All 40 palettes preserved verbatim.
